meta.title: WillChain – Your Digital Blockchain Will
meta.description: WillChain is an automated digital will on the blockchain. Your crypto assets will automatically transfer to your heir without lawyers or notaries.
meta.og_description: Your crypto assets will automatically transfer to your heir. No lawyers. No bureaucracy. Forever on the blockchain.

hero.title: When You're Gone – Your Assets Go to Your Chosen Heir
hero.subtitle: Every year, thousands of people die without a designated heir for their cryptocurrency. Loved ones know the funds exist but can't access them. WillChain solves this automatically.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: What Happens to Your Crypto After You're Gone?
problem.subtitle: Most people don't think about it until it's too late.
problem.card1_desc: If you're the only one with the private key, your funds disappear forever when you pass. No court or notary can help here.
problem.card2_desc: Billions in cryptocurrency sit untouched in abandoned wallets. Their owners are gone, and the funds are locked forever – inaccessible to anyone.
problem.card3_desc: Even if they know the funds exist, without the key or password, your family can't access them. It's a legal dead end.

dashboard.smart_wallet_warning: ⚠️ Smart Wallet (MultiSig/Safe) detected. Automatic timer resets when interacting with DApps are limited. For reliability, manually click 'I'm Here!' before each scheduled deadline.

dashboard.dividends_hint: Accrued from funds returned from abandoned wallets.

dashboard.activate_no_balance: You need WILL tokens to activate. Get them via the bot above.

recycle.label: Recycle Funds
recycle.hint: If a wallet owner has completely disappeared (no activity beyond the set period + 60 days) and hasn't designated an heir, anyone can initiate the recycling of funds and receive a 1% reward.
recycle.status_inactive: Inactive – Not Yet Abandoned (Total timeout not reached)

telegram.link_modal_hint: Sign a message with your wallet to confirm ownership. The signature will be automatically sent to the bot.
telegram.link_modal_success: ✅ Wallet Linked! Return to the Telegram bot.

how_it_works.label: 4 Steps
how_it_works.subtitle: Four simple steps to secure your crypto
how_it_works.title: How it Works
how_it_works.step1_desc: Buy WILL tokens on an exchange or receive them from another holder. Your digital will activates as soon as you hold any amount of WILL.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Specify the wallet address of the person who should receive your funds after your prolonged inactivity or passing. This can be your spouse, child, friend – anyone you care about.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Any outgoing transaction automatically confirms your activity. If your wallet hasn't been used for a while, manually click 'I'm Here!'
how_it_works.step4_desc: Set how long after a period of inactivity the WillChain mechanism triggers: 30, 90, 180, or 365 days. This is followed by a 30-day grace period and then 30 days for the heir.

trust.noncustodial_desc: No one but your heir will receive your funds

faq.label: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Do I need to log in daily?
faq.a1: No. If you regularly use your crypto wallet, the timer resets automatically. The 'I'm Here!' button is only needed if your wallet is completely inactive.
faq.a2: 30, 90, 180, or 365 days. You can change this anytime. Frequent traders might choose 30 days, while long-term investors might opt for 365.
faq.q3: What happens if the period expires?
faq.a3: A 30-day grace period begins – you can still confirm your presence. Then, the heir has 30 days to initiate a claim. If no heir is appointed or they don't claim in time, the funds are recycled: 47% are burned forever, 47% are distributed to WILL holders, 5% go to the protocol, and 1% to the initiator.
faq.q4: Can someone change my heir without my knowledge?
faq.a4: No. Only you, with your private key, can change the heir. The contract guarantees this.
faq.q5: Does anyone see my personal data?
faq.a5: No. Only your wallet address, balance, and activity timestamps are stored on the blockchain. No names or personal information.
faq.q6: Where is the smart contract located?
faq.a6: Deployed on the Base Sepolia testnet. The source code is open and verified on Basescan.
faq.q7: Does the auto-timer reset work with multi-sig wallets?
faq.a7: If you use a standard wallet (MetaMask, Trust Wallet), the timer resets with any transaction. However, if you use Smart Wallets or Multisig (like Safe) where a relayer executes transactions, you'll need to manually confirm your activity via the website button.
faq.q8: Can DEX or dApp approvals affect my inheritance?
faq.a8: No. Token allowances (approvals) do not affect your inheritance timer. Only your direct actions – sending a transfer, calling confirmActivity, or updating vault settings – count as confirming presence. A third party using `transferFrom()` cannot reset your timer. Your inheritance will still work even with active DEX approvals.

security.allowance_text: Only your direct actions count as confirming presence: transferring tokens, confirming activity, or updating vault settings. DEX swaps via allowances do not reset the timer. If you trade on a DEX, remember to confirm your activity separately.

disclaimer.title: Legal Information
disclaimer.modal_subtitle: Please read before connecting your wallet
disclaimer.s1_text: The WILL token is a utility token solely for managing digital inheritance within WillChain. Holding the token does not grant rights to profits, equity in the company, or any rights associated with securities.
disclaimer.s2_text: The token burning mechanism is a technical tool for network cleanup of inactive participants, not a promise of market value appreciation. We do not guarantee liquidity or future asset prices.
disclaimer.s3_text: The user is fully responsible for maintaining activity or performing manual confirmation before the set deadline. Loss of access to private keys or missing a deadline will result in irreversible loss of access to funds.
disclaimer.s4_text: The protocol is deployed on Base (Ethereum L2). You agree to the risks associated with smart contract vulnerabilities or blockchain network updates. This is experimental software – use at your own risk.
disclaimer.s5_text: The user is obligated to independently verify that using WillChain does not conflict with the laws of their jurisdiction.
disclaimer.checkbox: I have read and accept the terms. I understand I am fully responsible for my activity and potential loss of assets.

tiers.title: Vault Tier
